title: Technical Platform and Engineering Skills
summary: Backend AI stack, frontend engineering, spatial computing, prototyping, accessibility, and production integration.
body:
Joz's technical skill set spans AI backend architecture, product engineering, frontend systems, spatial computing, and rapid prototyping.

Current AI and backend stack:
Python, FastAPI, Django, Flask, PostgreSQL, pgvector, SQLAlchemy 2.0 asynchronous patterns, asyncpg, Redis, Docker, Linux, Git, REST APIs, event-driven workflows, caching, streaming, observability, CI/CD, automated testing, RAG, embeddings, vector search, semantic retrieval, agent memory, verification, and governance.

Product and experience engineering:
React, Vue, Angular, Flutter, Xcode, Android Studio, WebGL, Three.js, p5, Canvas, SCSS, design systems, rapid code-based prototyping, WCAG, EAA, privacy by design, and GDPR-aware experience design.

Spatial and multimodal:
USD and USDZ workflows, Unity, Unreal, Python, C#, C++, computer vision, 3D mathematics, vectors, linear algebra, Blender, Maya, Cinema 4D, and multimodal interaction design.

Use this record for technical-depth questions. Do not let the long tool list dominate general recruiter answers.

claims: Joz combines AI architecture with hands-on engineering and prototyping.
His current stack includes Python backend technologies and retrieval infrastructure.
His broader engineering experience includes modern frontend systems, WebGL, spatial computing, accessibility, and design systems.
proof_points: Python, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy async, PostgreSQL, pgvector, Redis, Docker, Linux, REST APIs and event-driven workflows.
React, Vue, Angular, Flutter, JavaScript design systems, WebGL, Three.js, p5 and Canvas.
USD(z), Unity/Unreal workflows, computer vision, 3D mathematics and spatial interfaces.
WCAG and European Accessibility Act implementation experience.
